description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa featuring a minimalist wooden frame with a natural finish. The sofa has four rectangular, plush cushions—two for the seat and two for the backrest—upholstered in a light gray fabric. The armrests are straight, unpadded, and made of the same wood as the frame, extending slightly above the seat level. The legs are also wooden, straight, and positioned at the corners, providing a sturdy base. The backrest is high and flat, with the cushions attached in a uniform, segmented arrangement. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or outdoor patios.
description: A modern two-seater sofa with a light gray cushioned seat and back, set in a minimalist wooden frame with straight armrests and legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, two seat cushions, two back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight wooden armrest and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel and the wooden frame enclosing the back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the cushions and the wooden armrest and leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four rectangular cushions: two seat and two back, all uniform in size, arranged in two horizontal rows, appearing to be loose but well-fitted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, unpadded wooden armrests at seat height, extending from the front to the back, with a simple, angular profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight wooden legs, one at each corner, integrated into the frame, with a natural wood finish and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight backrest with two large, rectangular cushions forming a continuous, segmented surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
